news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: DeFiLlama数据显示，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主因新晋DEX交易量增长。
news.summary_en: DeFiLlama data shows Solana's total value locked rose 12% this week, driven by increased trading volume on new DEXs.

news.title_zh: Cardano公布2026年Plutus V4升级路线图
news.title_en: Cardano Unveils 2026 Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4技术路线图，预计Q3上线主网，将增强智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 technical roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3. The upgrade will enhance smart contract expressiveness and reduce transaction fees.

news.title_zh: Chainlink CCIP新增支持五条公链
news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for Five Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism五条主流公链。
news.summary_en: Chainlink’s Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding its multi-chain connectivity.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币拟引入ZK-Rollup扩容方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Core Dev Proposes ZK-Rollup Layer2 Solution
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin核心开发者提议基于ZK-Rollup的Layer2方案，以降低小额转账手续费。目前该草案由基金会研究小组发布。
news.summary_en: Dogecoin Foundation’s research group releases a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution to reduce transaction fees for small transfers.
